name: ultratorrent
description: UltraTorrent — a modern, self-hosted torrent management platform

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ultratorrent/shared && npm run build --workspace @ultratorrent/backend && npm run build --workspace @ultratorrent/frontend
scripts.package: V=$(node -e "process.stdout.write(require('./version.json').version)"); GS=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null); GT=$(git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null); BT=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ); docker build --build-arg ULTRATORRENT_VERSION=$V --build-arg GIT_SHA=$GS --build-arg GIT_TAG=$GT --build-arg BUILD_TIME=$BT -f apps/backend/Dockerfile -t ultratorrent/backend:$V -t ultratorrent/backend . && docker build -f apps/frontend/Dockerfile -t ultratorrent/frontend:$V -t ultratorrent/frontend .
scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @ultratorrent/backend & npm run dev --workspace @ultratorrent/frontend

workspaces:note: UltraTorrent uses npm workspaces. Run `npm install` at the repo root.
